sql_array: CREATE TABLE hexagons (id UInt64, origin UInt64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, h3HexRing(origin, toUInt16(2)) AS hexRing FROM hexagons;
UPDATE hexagons SET origin = 590080540275638272 WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, origin, h3HexRing(origin, toUInt16(1)) AS hexRing FROM hexagons WHERE id = 1;
